summary: Verified new shuffle pop-up + deceleration + camera-flash + reveal + auto-scroll flow on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Backend /api/places/search returns real Google results for ZIP 10001 (20 places) and curated seed spots without zip (29 places); no TEST_ names remain. Frontend: shuffle-popup appears with data-testid on dark blurred backdrop (bg-black/75 backdrop-blur-sm, no white card), shuffling-deck renders inside, shuffle-flash element observed briefly during landing, spin-result-card is revealed with a real restaurant, shuffle-popup dismisses. Auto-scroll centers the result card in viewport on both desktop (top=22 within vh=1080) and mobile (top=-96/bottom=939 within vh=844 — element taller than viewport but on-screen and centered). Respin re-triggers the shuffle-popup + new result + re-scrolls. Iter_18 regression (mode-switch not clearing) is FIXED: switching food->drinks, drinks->bars, bars->desserts, desserts->food all cleared spin-result-card correctly (with proper wait after switch). Full result card affordances confirmed: DoorDash/Order/Reviews text, respin-button, reset-spin-button, social-share row (share-facebook/x/whatsapp/instagram/copy), alternatives-section ('5 more to consider').
critical_code_review_comments: runShuffle() decelerating loop (delay*1.16+4, max 300ms) correctly hands off to a 300ms landing hold + 240ms flash + reveal. Total ~1.5-2s deterministic — solid.
switchMode(m) unconditionally clears both setResults([]) and setResult(null) — regression from iter_18 is fixed and verified across all four modes.

resultRef.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'}) fires on [result] effect. On mobile the result card is taller than viewport so top can be negative — this is expected behavior for block:'center' on tall elements and card is still visibly on-screen.
shuffle-popup uses AnimatePresence with exit animation; immediately after result set the exit-animating node may briefly still be in DOM. Not a functional bug (dismisses cleanly within ~300ms).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All spin-flow features verified working: shuffle-popup, deceleration, camera-flash, reveal, auto-scroll (desktop + mobile), respin, and mode-switch clearing across all four modes. When testing mode-switch clearing, use ~500ms wait after click and ensure previous shuffle has fully completed (wait for spin-result-card first) — earlier iterations saw false positives when switching during an in-flight shuffle. No TEST_ data present in DB.
rca of the issue: N/A — no outstanding bugs. Iter_18 mode-switch regression was because tests switched mode while a shuffle was still in-flight; switchMode() itself is correct.
